title: Training with Kyle 5/7/19 Treadmill Ran 1.5 Miles

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about a low-energy training day on May 6-7, 2019, where he walked 1.5 miles on his treadmill at 4mph after a night of zero sleep. He reflects on the physical pain of being sedentary for years, compares it to overtraining symptoms, and plans to swim 10km the next day while trying to finish a 2000-page audiobook on Irish history for an upcoming book review.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Years of inactivity produce body pain identical to overtraining, making it impossible to gauge fitness level
Watching movies while running was too depressing at his current pace; needs to reframe expectations and just 'trot'
Entertains the idea that lower testosterone from age may explain his insomnia, but doesn't commit to it
Training and book reviews are intertwined like the caduceus snakes — must do both together
